narrative: Artifact unchanged from iteration 1 — no failing checks to address. All four auto checks and all four AI checks pass. The intent statement is stable and ready for architect sign-off. Run /jupiter:review to approve and begin requirements.

process_gaps.finding: AI-AI-001 does not distinguish product names from functional role names (e.g. 'general ledger') — the check boundary is ambiguous
process_gaps.recommended_action: Add a note to AI-AI-001 clarifying that domain vocabulary terms from the project glossary (general ledger, tax provision, cost centre) are permitted in the Problem Statement; only product/platform names (Oracle, SAP, AWS, Murex) are prohibited.

process_gaps.finding: No check verifies that project.yml scope.in_scope / scope.out_of_scope are populated before the intent phase completes
process_gaps.recommended_action: Add an auto check AC-AI-005 to architecture-intent.yml: project.yml scope.in_scope must contain at least one entry, or the artifact must include an explicit in-scope statement. Prevents scope ambiguity propagating into requirements.

process_gaps.finding: workspace/context/adrs/ is empty — no prior ADRs loaded (recurs from iteration 1)
process_gaps.recommended_action: If prior ADRs ratifying Oracle TRCS, CDH, or the Oracle Cloud platform selection exist in the enterprise ADR repository, add them to workspace/context/adrs/ before the design phase. They will tighten the Known Constraints and reduce design decision space.
